title: Margerie Glacier, Glacier Bay National Park
description: Margerie Glacier flowing from the Fairweather Mountains into Glacier Bay. Blue-white ice face under snow-covered peaks with small icebergs in the foreground water.
alt: Margerie Glacier can be seen flowing down from the Fairweather Mountains into Glacier Bay
